name: State Fair Lemonade
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring lemons to room temperature.
2. Roll the lemons, slice them in half, and squeeze into a gallon container.
3. Add the lemon rinds to the container.
4. Sprinkle sugar over the rinds.
5. Allow the mixture to sit for one hour.
6. Add ice cubes and enough water to fill the container.
7. Stir gently and serve. Each 12 oz serving contains 91 calories and 0 grams of fat.
